title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates!
